metadata.seed: I have a ton of tests and projects all due very soon and it is during a time in which I had not seen any friends and am feeling down. I feel very overwhelmed and sad.

patient.query: I have a ton of tests and projects all due very soon and it is during a time in which I had not seen any friends and am feeling down. I feel very overwhelmed and sad.

triggers: ton of tests and projects due soon

It's understandable to feel this way, but let's work together to find ways to manage your stress and improve your mood.

patient.query: Yeah, it’s just been a lot lately. I thought I could handle it, but the more assignments pile up, the more I feel like I’m drowning. I miss hanging out with my friends, too. It feels like I’ve put everything else on hold just to get through this.

automatic_thoughts: I thought I could handle it

patient.query: I guess I just don’t want to feel like I’m failing. It’s like, even when I do finish something, it doesn’t feel like enough. And then I see everyone else juggling things so easily, and I wonder why I can’t do that too. I just wish I could find a way to enjoy those moments with my friends without this constant weight on my shoulders.

automatic_thoughts: why can’t I do that too

entailment: Fear of being a burden to others (finding)
neutral: Fear of being in a small group (finding)

patient.query: It really is overwhelming. I just want to make sure I don’t disappoint anyone—my family, my teachers, even my friends. But then it feels like I'm stuck in this cycle where I can’t get anything done because I keep worrying about how it’ll turn out. I guess I just don’t want to let anyone down, but in trying so hard, I end up feeling more lost.

automatic_thoughts: I don’t want to let anyone down

It’s just... it's always there in the back of my mind.

automatic_thoughts: I don’t want to feel tied down by expectations

I really want to break free from all that pressure, but I’m not sure where to start.
